headline: A Look Back at Social Networking Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: Yelp (NYSE:YELP) Vs The Rest Of The Pack
summary: As the Q1 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the social networking industry, including Yelp (NYSE:YELP) and its peers.

headline: Exclusive: Substack hires Dan Robbins as head of brand sponsorships
summary: Substack has hired former Roku and PayPal executive Dan Robbins as its first head of brand sponsorships, he exclusively tells Axios.

headline: 2 Value Stocks to Target This Week and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: The low valuation multiples for value stocks provide a margin of safety that growth stocks rarely offer. However, the challenge lies in determining whether these cheap assets are genuinely undervalued or simply on sale due to their potentially deteriorating business models.

raw.headline: 2 Value Stocks to Target This Week and 1 Facing Challenges

headline: Digital Payment Update - Greece's Social Commerce Set For Major Growth By 2026
summary: The Greek social commerce market is on track for impressive growth, anticipated to expand at an annual rate of 12.4% to exceed USD 7 billion by 2026. This sector demonstrates significant potential across a variety of segments, including domestic vs. cross-border transactions, various social platforms, and an array of payment methods, underpinned by digital and mobile payment strategies. Key retail categories driving this expansion include clothing, beauty, food, and travel, supported by...
